description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with a modern industrial design, featuring a black metal frame and three wooden shelves. The bottom section includes a slatted wooden surface that functions as a desk or worktop, supported by two drawers with visible handles beneath. The frame is constructed from thin, rectangular metal tubing, providing both stability and an open, airy appearance. The rear of the unit has a cross-brace for added structural support, while the sides are open, allowing easy access to the shelves. The wood surfaces have a natural finish, contrasting with the matte black metal, and the overall structure is suitable for use in urban environments such as home offices, garages, or workshops. No glass panels or decorative elements are present, emphasizing functionality and durability.
description: A tall, freestanding shelving unit with a black metal frame, three wooden shelves, and two drawers beneath a slatted wooden worktop. The design is modern and industrial, suitable for urban interiors or workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden shelves, a slatted worktop, and two drawers with handles beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the angled support structure of the metal frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cross-brace for stability and the open back of the shelves and drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the shelves and frame.
